regulation.summary: Amends the BCRA's consolidated text on Payment Service Providers (PSP), introducing the new figure of 'PSPCP como Servicio' (PSP offering payment accounts as a service to clients of a third party), updating registration requirements, disqualifications for shareholders/directors, deregistration grounds, and AML/CFT obligations.

candidate_entities.name: Banco Central de la República Argentina
candidate_entities.description: Argentine central bank, issuer of this communication and authority over PSPs.

candidate_entities.name: Comisión Nacional de Valores
candidate_entities.description: Argentine securities regulator; recognizes markets, clearinghouses and agents that cannot operate as PSP.

candidate_entities.name: Unidad de Información Financiera
candidate_entities.description: Argentine financial intelligence unit; communicates terrorism financing resolutions and may sanction obligated subjects.

candidate_entities.name: Superintendencia de Seguros de la Nación
candidate_entities.description: Argentine insurance superintendence whose sanctions are considered for PSP eligibility.

candidate_entities.name: Superintendencia de Entidades Financieras y Cambiarias
candidate_entities.description: BCRA superintendence receiving documentation and assessing PSP inactivity and audit registration.

candidate_entities.name: Comité del Consejo de Seguridad de la Organización de las Naciones Unidas
candidate_entities.description: UN Security Council Committee whose designations trigger sanctions and restrictive measures applicable to PSP shareholders/directors.

candidate_entities.name: Proveedores de Servicios de Pago
candidate_entities.description: Payment service providers regulated by the BCRA.

candidate_entities.name: Proveedores de Servicios de Pago que ofrecen Cuentas de Pago
candidate_entities.description: PSPs that offer payment accounts.

candidate_entities.name: PSPCP como Servicio
candidate_entities.description: PSPs that offer payment accounts -- and eventually interoperable digital wallet services -- to clients of a third party that takes the service, where clients use the accounts through a user interface provided by the third party and technologically integrated with the PSPCP.

candidate_entities.name: Proveedores de Servicios de Pago que cumplen la función de Iniciación
candidate_entities.description: PSPs performing the payment initiation function.

candidate_entities.name: Redes de Transferencias Electrónicas de Fondos
Administradores de Esquemas de Pago de Transferencias Electrónicas de Fondos
Empresas de Cobranza Extrabancaria de Impuestos y/o Servicios
Registro de proveedores de servicios de pago
candidate_entities.description: BCRA registry where PSPs are inscribed.

candidate_entities.name: Registro Público de Personas y Entidades vinculadas a actos de Terrorismo y su Financiamiento
candidate_entities.description: Public registry of persons and entities linked to terrorism and its financing.

candidate_entities.name: Registro Nacional de Reincidencia
candidate_entities.description: Argentine national criminal records registry that issues background certificates.

candidate_entities.name: Registro de Auditores
candidate_entities.description: Auditors registry maintained at the SEFYC.

candidate_entities.name: Ley General de Sociedades 19.550
candidate_entities.description: Argentine general companies law; foreign legal persons must comply with it to habitually exercise acts in Argentina.

candidate_entities.name: Ley de Entidades Financieras
candidate_entities.description: Argentine financial institutions law; article 10 lists disqualifications applicable to PSP shareholders/directors.

candidate_entities.name: Ley de Régimen Penal Cambiario
candidate_entities.description: Argentine foreign exchange criminal regime law.

candidate_entities.name: Ley 25.506
candidate_entities.description: Argentine digital signature law applicable to the sworn statements required.

candidate_entities.name: Texto ordenado sobre Proveedores de Servicios de Pago
candidate_entities.description: BCRA consolidated text on Payment Service Providers, modified by this communication.

candidate_entities.name: Texto ordenado sobre Sistema Nacional de Pagos - Servicios de Pago
candidate_entities.description: BCRA consolidated text on the National Payments System - Payment Services.

candidate_entities.name: Texto ordenado sobre Protección de los Usuarios de Servicios Financieros
candidate_entities.description: BCRA consolidated text on protection of users of financial services.

candidate_entities.name: Texto ordenado sobre Prevención del Lavado de Activos, del Financiamiento del Terrorismo y Otras Actividades Ilícitas
candidate_entities.description: BCRA consolidated text on AML/CFT and other illicit activities applicable to PSPs that are obligated subjects before the UIF.

candidate_entities.name: Cuenta de Pago
candidate_entities.description: Payment account offered by PSPCPs.

candidate_entities.name: Billetera digital interoperable
candidate_entities.description: Interoperable digital wallet service eventually offered alongside payment accounts.

candidate_entities.name: Oficial de Cumplimiento
candidate_entities.description: Compliance officer (titular and alternate) before the UIF whose identity must be informed at PSP registration.

candidate_entities.name: Persona Expuesta Políticamente
candidate_entities.description: Politically exposed person status under UIF regulations, subject of a sworn declaration.

candidate_entities.name: Banco patrocinante
candidate_entities.description: Sponsor bank(s) that PSPCPs must declare in their operational and commercial description.

candidate_entities.name: Incorporación digital
candidate_entities.description: Digital client onboarding subject to BCRA rules.
